← All sessions
Thursday, April 16

Global Tastemakers, Culture, and Soft Power

2:30 – 2:50 PM
Atlas Stage · Grand A/B, 2nd Floor
Guests
Leif Abraham
Co-CEO and Co-Founder, Public
Ben Miller
Co-Founder & CEO, Fundrise
Moderator Questions
AI agents as the next platform shift in portfolio management — are we there yet, or is this still hype?
Private market access for retail investors: SPVs don't work, 40-Act funds are complex. What's the right structure?
The wealth channel is 'pay to play' — Blackstone wins because they're the biggest fee payers to large banks. Is that fair to investors?
Ben, you say companies should only go public if they need liquidity, which is rare. Does that mean the IPO market is effectively dead for a generation?
Leif, you argue there's still a 'story premium' in public markets. But SaaS stocks led by great storytellers have been hammered. Are retail investors still buying the story?
